name: Waste Recycling Optimizer
note: Estimates based on Azure retail pricing. Actual costs depend on usage, region, reserved instances, and enterprise agreements.

services.name: Azure AI Vision
services.purpose: Waste classification from bin cameras — recyclable vs contaminated vs landfill, material type identification

services.name: Azure OpenAI
services.purpose: GPT-4o for contamination analysis reasoning, route optimization narration, citizen education, and operational reports

services.name: Azure IoT Hub
services.purpose: Smart bin fill-level sensors, truck GPS telemetry, sorting facility equipment monitoring

services.name: Container Apps
services.purpose: Recycling API — waste classifier, route optimizer, contamination detector, fleet dashboard, citizen portal

services.name: Cosmos DB
services.purpose: Bin fill levels, route history, classification results, contamination events, fleet telemetry, recycling metrics

services.name: Azure Maps
services.purpose: Route optimization for collection trucks — traffic-aware routing, service area coverage, fleet tracking

services.name: Key Vault
services.purpose: IoT device credentials, API keys, Maps subscription keys, encryption keys for operational data

services.name: Application Insights
services.purpose: Classification accuracy, route efficiency metrics, contamination rates, system health, fleet performance

optimization_tips: Use edge AI on sorting facility cameras for initial waste classification, only send ambiguous items to cloud Vision API — reduces API calls by 70%
Use GPT-4o-mini for routine contamination reports and citizen queries, reserve GPT-4o for complex route optimization reasoning — saves 65% on AI costs
Batch IoT fill-level reports at 15-minute intervals instead of real-time — bins don't fill that fast and reduces IoT Hub message costs by 90%
Cache optimal routes and only re-calculate when bin fill levels cross threshold (e.g., 75%) — avoids redundant Maps API calls
Archive classification images older than 30 days to cool/archive storage — reduces Vision processing backlog and storage costs
Set Azure Cost Management budgets with alerts at 50%, 80%, 100%
